query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS drift_snapshots (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  scheduleId INT NOT NULL,
  userId INT NOT NULL,
  baselineId INT NOT NULL,
  previousBaselineId INT NOT NULL,
  driftPercent FLOAT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  driftCount INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  totalItems INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  byCategory JSON NOT NULL,
  byAgent JSON NOT NULL,
  agentIds JSON NOT NULL,
  notificationSent BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,
  topDriftItems JSON,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX idx_drift_schedule (scheduleId),
  INDEX idx_drift_user (userId),
  INDEX idx_drift_created (createdAt)
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3xenzgJ3NGNThF2.96bc46f6ec2f --database 9n2ukZGVgWAjZMdS2ZS3BU --execute 
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS drift_snapshots (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  scheduleId INT NOT NULL,
  userId INT NOT NULL,
  baselineId INT NOT NULL,
  previousBaselineId INT NOT NULL,
  driftPercent FLOAT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  driftCount INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  totalItems INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  byCategory JSON NOT NULL,
  byAgent JSON NOT NULL,
  agentIds JSON NOT NULL,
  notificationSent BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,
  topDriftItems JSON,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX idx_drift_schedule (scheduleId),
  INDEX idx_drift_user (userId),
  INDEX idx_drift_created (createdAt)
);
